content: We can frame Self-Refine’s iterative self-improvement workflow as the foundational operational skeleton for multi-perspective LLM self-reflection mechanisms, where each iteration of Self-Refine can be anchored to a distinct inconsistent solving perspective from self-reflection research to amplify refinement gains without extra training or supervision. This creates a layered self-improvement system that leverages both iterative refinement and diverse critical thinking to outperform single-perspective Self-Refine.
